blocks.text: Salah out — Liverpool face Brighton test without their talisman

After a 4-0 midweek dismantling of Galatasaray, Liverpool travel to Brighton without Salah — ruled out of league duty and internationals. Fifth in the table, 21 points off Arsenal, the top-four battle just got sharper.

blocks.label: ⚽ Sunday
items: ⚽ 13:00 — Newcastle United vs Sunderland — Tyne-Wear derby back at St. James' Park
⚽ 14:00 — Barcelona vs Rayo Vallecano — Barça fresh from 7-2 CL demolition of Newcastle
